windows.embed_text_v2: applying printed adhesive scent labels to amber glass jar candles, overhead view, printed label sheet, folded cream cloth, rows of finished poured soy candles, kraft tabletop, labeling and finishing stage
windows.summary_v2: Overhead clip transitions from showing a sheet of printed scent labels next to rows of poured amber jar candles to placing a single jar on a cloth and beginning to apply a 'Mojave Desert' label.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a printed sheet of candle labels on craft paper next to rows of poured amber glass jar candles; overlay text reads 'Now onto labels!'
Same overhead shot, label sheet and amber jar candles arranged on the workbench, overlay 'Now onto labels!' still present.
Slightly shifted overhead of the printed adhesive label sheet beside the rows of finished amber jar candles.
Overhead of the same label sheet and amber candle rows; overlay text has cleared from the frame.
Cut to overhead of a folded cream washcloth on the kraft work surface beside the rows of amber jar candles; a hand enters from the bottom.
An empty amber glass candle jar is placed upright on the folded cloth, centered as a labeling stand.
Same overhead, the amber jar sits steady on the folded cloth ready for label application.
Hand enters the lower edge of the frame approaching the jar to begin labeling.
Two hands hold a peeled adhesive label reading 'Mojave Desert' just above the amber jar, preparing to wrap it onto the glass.

windows.embed_text_v2: Inspecting underside label of small amber brown glass candle jar, bare hands rotating it on a folded grey towel over kraft paper, reading CLP hazard diamond and safety pictograms, Wood Sage Sea Salt scent
windows.summary_v2: Bare hands rotate and inspect the labelled underside of a small amber glass 'Wood Sage & Sea Salt' candle jar resting on a folded towel.

tags_v2.action: inspecting and rotating labelled candle jar
tags_v2.on_screen_text: Wood Sage & Sea Salt (product base label with CLP hazard pictograms)

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead shot of two bare hands cupping a small amber/brown glass candle jar set on a folded grey textured towel over kraft paper; thumbs steady the jar as the underside 'Wood Sage & Sea Salt' label with a red CLP hazard diamond comes into view.
Hands rotate the brown jar slightly, both thumbs pressing the base label; the red exclamation hazard symbol and small print are partially legible as the jar turns.
Continuing to turn the jar on the towel, the underside label scrolls; CLP pictograms and the 'Wood Sage & Sea' product name shift as fingers reposition around the rim.
Jar tipped further so the full circular base label faces the camera, showing the dark amber glass bottom, hazard diamond and a row of pictogram icons; right thumb taps near the label edge.
Hands hold the jar upright on the towel, the base label now squared to camera revealing 'Wood Sage & Sea Salt' text, red warning diamond and a horizontal strip of safety pictograms beneath.
Both thumbs frame the base label as the jar is held flat; the full ingredient and warning text block and pictogram row are clearly visible on the underside of the brown glass jar.
Jar held steady and centred, fingers spread around it; the underside 'Wood Sage & Sea Salt' label with red CLP diamond and pictograms is fully presented to the camera for reading.
Slight clockwise turn of the jar, hands gripping the sides; the base label and pictograms rotate as the person inspects the small print on the brown glass vessel.
Right hand lifts away and sweeps over the jar while the left releases; the brown jar settles upright on the grey towel, its labelled base still angled toward the camera as the segment ends.
